walletNftGrid.emptyIdentifier: Provide a wallet address or ENS name to view NFTs.

walletNftGrid.noNftsFound: No Namefi NFTs found for this wallet.
walletNftGrid.noNftsFoundHint: Double-check the wallet address or ENS name, or try again later while indexing catches up.
